chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1708 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 6787/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 6788/2025 4. For hearing of main case 12.09.2025 Mr. Mansoor Ali Panhwar, Advocate for petitioner. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. At the very outset learned Counsel for petitioner submits that the Petitioner would avail remedy provided under the law to approach the Electric Inspector and under instructions does not press this Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with application listed at serial No.3. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
